---
title: "The Rev. Eustace Wilberforce Jacob"
---

## The Rev. Eustace Wilberforce Jacob

**Dates:** (b.?1834-9 July 1871)

### Description

SPG missionary in South Africa;  brother of Edgar, Edith and Gertrude Jacob

### Biography

He died at his father's rectory at Crawley.  He was described on the 1871 census as 'curate of Rookloof D. Natal' and in the death announcement in <i>The Times</i>  (12 July 1871) as 'missionary of the SPG of the diocese of Natal and eldest surviving son of the Archdeacon of Winchester'.  At the time of the census his wife Marianne F. Jacob (b. 1824/5) was also resident at the Rectory.

### Letters

- Letter from July 18th 1871

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
